THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) LEONID YALKITMAN AND YULIYA YALKITMAN WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WERE ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER ROMAN YALKITMAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
